title: Bind safe rich bridge fields into execution-facing flow
objective: Bind a safe subset of already-transported model-issued fields into execution and monitoring flow without adding new strategy logic.
acceptance_criteria: execution uses a richer subset of model-issued fields than before
TP/SL handling is bound where applicable
size handling is bound where applicable and safe
monitoring/debug truth can access held outcome, matchup, freshness, and reasons
rollback: Revert the narrow binding changes in bot_core.py and core/paper_exec.py.
